THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ARAB-AMERICAN BUSINESS & CONSUMER CO JOUBRAN, FADY EL-MENDELEK, LODY $7,452.02 PRINCIPAL, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $61.20 INTEREST, $213.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,801.22, AND POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING: [FAIR MARKET VALUE $7500.] -9870 AB DICK OFFSET PRESS; 1-9855 SWING AWAY COLOR HEAD; 1-3874 POWDER SPRAY ATTACHMENT. TO BE CREDITED TO JUDGMENT IF RECOVERED AND SOLD. NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
